cloudIndex.searchPlaceholder: Search by course, session, instructor, or college…
cloudIndex.selectFile: Select a file to preview slides
cloudIndex.removalBody: This removes only the version(s) you uploaded for this lecture. Other contributors' versions are unaffected.
cloudIndex.removalNoVersions: You haven't uploaded any versions of this lecture.

auth.signInMessage: Please sign in to Yanhekt to access all resources.
auth.accessMessage: You can now access all resources from Yanhekt.

settings.slideDetectionDescription: The interval will be automatically adjusted based on playback speed.
settings.slideStabilityDescription: Prevents false detection from animations by confirming a new slide after it remains unchanged for several consecutive checks.
settings.taskSpeedDescription: Playback speed for automated task processing.
settings.autoPostProcessingDescription: Automatically run post-processing after slide extraction completes.
settings.autoPostProcessingLiveDescription: Automatically execute post-processing when each new slide is saved in live mode.
settings.enableAutoPostProcessingLive: Live Mode (When Each Slide Is Saved)
settings.parallelTasksDescription: How many queued tasks run at once. Post-processing still runs one at a time.
settings.maxManualTabsDescription: Most playback tabs you can open manually at once.

cloudStorage.title: Cloud Storage
cloudStorage.intro: AutoSlides needs to set up cloud storage in your Yanhekt myNotes page before it can import or publish slides.
cloudStorage.groupDescription: AutoSlides stores your imported slides here as notes.
cloudStorage.groupDescriptionUser: Your personal watch-mode notes, with captured slides.
cloudStorage.syncDescription: Automatically import a slide folder to your notes when you finish reviewing or editing it. Folders that already have a note are skipped.
cloudStorage.autoPublish: Also publish to Cloud Index after auto sync
cloudStorage.autoPublishDescription: Applies to auto sync only, not to manual imports.
cloudStorage.resyncDescription: When a folder that already has a note is edited again, replace its note with the freshly-edited slides.
cloudStorage.resyncRequiresSync: Enable auto sync to notes first — resync replaces a note that auto sync created.
cloudStorage.autoRepublish: Also republish to Cloud Index after auto resync
cloudStorage.autoRepublishDescription: Applies to auto resync only, not to manual imports.
cloudStorage.watchSyncDescription: When you watch a live stream or a recorded session and start slide extraction, AutoSlides creates a personal note in the ASuser group and appends each captured slide. Edit it live from the right-panel Notes tab.
cloudStorage.watchSyncEnable: Auto sync slide capture from live streams and recorded sessions in watch mode

advanced.tokenDescription: Manually input your authentication token for direct access.
advanced.pngColorReductionDescription: Reduce PNG colors to 128 to significantly decrease file size (50-70% smaller) with minimal visual quality loss.
advanced.ssimDescription: Higher global structural similarity threshold indicate stricter matching. You can test the detection accuracy in Menu > Help > SSIM Test.
advanced.ssimWarning: Adjust ONLY IF NECESSARY, as a minor change of 0.001 can significantly impact performance.

classroomRules.title: Adaptive Classroom Rules
classroomRules.description: When using Adaptive mode, SSIM threshold is automatically adjusted based on classroom location:
classroomRules.reason: These buildings have older equipment and poorer screen recording quality, requiring a more lenient threshold.

advanced.pHashDescription: Hamming distance threshold for pHash comparison in post-processing. Lower values indicate stricter similarity detection.
advanced.postProcessingPhasesDescription: Configure which phases are enabled during post-processing.
advanced.enableDuplicateRemovalDescription: Remove duplicate slides by comparing pHash values between all captured slides.
advanced.enableExclusionListDescription: Remove slides that match items in the pHash exclusion list.
advanced.enableAIFilteringDescription: Use AI to classify and filter out non-slide images.
advanced.aiFilteringReminder: AI can make mistakes. You can restore incorrectly removed images from the trash folder.

autoCrop.title: Auto Crop
autoCrop.description: Tune slide-canvas detection used by the Auto Crop workflow. Defaults work for most recordings; lower the aspect tolerance for stricter matches.
autoCrop.detectorModeDescription: Choose how the slide canvas is located. The fallback mode runs Canny first and only invokes the YOLO model when Canny fails.
autoCrop.cannyThenYolo: Use Canny First, Then Fall Back to YOLO
autoCrop.aspectToleranceDescription: Maximum allowed deviation from 16:9 or 4:3 when matching the detected slide aspect ratio.
autoCrop.blackThresholdDescription: Maximum pixel luminance (0-255) treated as black when stripping letterbox borders.
autoCrop.maxBorderFracDescription: Upper limit of black border removed from each side, as a fraction of the image dimension.
autoCrop.cannyLowThresholdDescription: Lower threshold for Canny edge detection used to locate slide edges.
autoCrop.cannyHighThresholdDescription: Upper threshold for Canny edge detection used to locate slide edges.
autoCrop.areaRatioMinDescription: Minimum slide area relative to the full frame. Candidates smaller than this are rejected.
autoCrop.areaRatioMaxDescription: Maximum slide area relative to the full frame. Candidates larger than this are rejected.
autoCrop.marginFracDescription: Fractional margin added around the detected slide bounding box before cropping.
autoCrop.fillRatioMinDescription: Minimum ratio of the candidate bounding box area to its convex hull area.

yolo.title: YOLO Parameters
yolo.confidenceThresholdDescription: Minimum detection confidence [0.05–0.95] before a candidate is kept.
yolo.iouThresholdDescription: IoU threshold used by non-max suppression to de-duplicate overlapping boxes.
yolo.inputSizeDescription: Square input size (pixels) the image is letterboxed to before inference.

model.title: Model
model.hint: Selecting a custom model replaces the built-in one for auto-crop. Deleting reverts to built-in.
model.tooLarge: Model file is too large (max 200 MB).

aiBehaviour.title: AI Behaviour
aiBehaviour.distinguishDescription: When enabled, AI treats presentation edit-mode frames (PowerPoint/Keynote/Google Slides in editing view) as a separate class rather than merging them into non-slide frames. These frames are moved to trash as "AI Filtered – Edit" and can be restored and auto-cropped later.

advanced.pHashExclusionDescription: Manage a list of image hashes to exclude from slide detection. Images matching these hashes will be ignored during post-processing.
advanced.clearExclusionListMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all exclusion items?
advanced.clearExclusionListDetail: This will remove all items from the pHash exclusion list. This action cannot be undone.
advanced.enterNamePlaceholder: Enter a name for this exclusion item...
advanced.downsamplingDescription: Downsample images before SSIM calculation for anti-aliasing to improve detection accuracy.
advanced.videoErrorDescription: Number of retry attempts when video playback errors occur.
advanced.videoTokenRefreshDescription: How often the player re-fetches the anti-hotlink video token while streaming. The token stays valid for about 10 minutes, so a longer interval means fewer token requests.
advanced.showMorePlaybackSpeedDescription: Show the full playback speed list in the playback page.
advanced.preventSystemSleepDescription: Prevent the system from going to sleep during video playback to avoid interruptions.
advanced.homePreviewFromVideoDescription: Capture a frame from the screen recording to use as the Home page preview. When disabled, cards show a cover image instead.
advanced.homePreviewSeekDescription: How many seconds into the latest recording to capture the preview frame.

qtExtractor.title: Auto Extraction After Download
qtExtractor.titleDescription: Speed up slide extraction by running the external AutoSlides Extractor on each finished screen recording. It extracts slides from local video files with hardware acceleration support, which is faster than capturing slides during live playback.
qtExtractor.autoRun: Run C++ Slide Extraction Automatically After Download
qtExtractor.autoRunDescription: After each screen recording finishes downloading, run the external AutoSlides Extractor on the video file. Requires the AutoSlides Extractor executable to be installed and verified.
qtExtractor.autoPostProcessDescription: Chain the standard 3-phase post-processing (duplicates, exclusion list, AI) on the extracted slides folder.
qtExtractor.sectionDescription: AutoSlides Extractor is a standalone C++ application. Install it separately, then point this field at the executable.
qtExtractor.sourceLink: See the GitHub repository for details.
qtExtractor.linuxBuildFromSource: No official Linux build; build from source and browse to your compiled executable.
qtExtractor.pathPlaceholder: Not detected — click Refresh or Browse to pick a path

advanced.concurrentDownloadDescription: Maximum number of simultaneous downloads and processing.
advanced.downloadMaxWorkersDescription: Number of concurrent connections per download for fetching video segments.
advanced.cacheManagementDescription: Manage application cache and temporary files to free up disk space.
advanced.clearCacheMessage: Are you sure you want to clear all cache files?
advanced.clearCacheDetail: This will remove temporary files, logs, and other cached data. This action cannot be undone.
advanced.resetAllDataMessage: This will completely reset the application to factory settings.
advanced.resetAllDataDetail: All settings, cache, logs, and user data will be permanently deleted. This action cannot be undone.
advanced.finalConfirmationMessage: Are you absolutely sure you want to reset ALL data?
advanced.finalConfirmationDetail: This will delete everything and the application will restart as if newly installed.
advanced.resetSuccess: Application data has been reset successfully
advanced.restartRequiredMessage: The application needs to restart to complete the reset.
advanced.restartRequiredDetail: Click 'Restart Now' to restart immediately, or 'Restart Later' to restart manually.
advanced.intranetInterfaceDescription: Bind intranet-mode traffic to a specific local network interface. This applies ONLY to requests routed through intranet mode; all other traffic uses the system default route.
advanced.intranetInterfaceNotFound: Selected interface is not currently available. Intranet traffic will use the system default until it is reconnected.
advanced.intranetMappingDescription: Domain to IP mappings used when internal network mode is enabled. These mappings allow the application to access internal servers directly within the campus network.

ai.serviceTypeDescription: Choose a service: the built-in option (shared service, so availability may fluctuate), GitHub Copilot, or a custom OpenAI-compatible API. Custom service docs:
ai.modelNotLoggedIn: Please log in to view model info
ai.cloudflareHint: To use the built-in AI service, please disable your proxy or VPN and try again.
ai.rateLimitCustomHint: To avoid hitting ModelScope's API rate limit, we recommend setting Max Concurrent Requests to 1 and Min Time Between Requests to 6000ms.
ai.requestSettingsHint: Batch Size and Image Size should be configured based on your vLLM context window, as larger values may trigger 413 Payload Too Large errors.
ai.variantSimpleHint: You are editing the prompts used when "Distinguish may_be_slide" is off. Responses must be slide or not_slide.
ai.variantDistinguishHint: You are editing the prompts used when "Distinguish may_be_slide" is on. Responses must be slide, not_slide, or may_be_slide_edit.
ai.promptLiveDescription: Processes one image at a time. Expected response:
ai.promptRecordedDescription: Processes multiple images in batch. Expected response:
ai.builtinDisclaimer: This service is provided by the developer free of charge and on an "as is" basis. We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the continuity or stability of the service, and we may modify or interrupt the service at any time without prior notice. The user agrees to use the service in a reasonable, fair, and non-commercial manner.
ai.copilotInvalidToken: Invalid token. Please check and try again.
ai.copilotDeviceCodeExpired: Device code expired. Please try again.
ai.rateLimitCopilotHint: GitHub Copilot has its own rate limits. Recommended: Max Concurrent 1, Min Time 6000ms.

ml.classifierModeDescription: Choose how image classification runs: LLM API mode uses a cloud AI service, while ML mode runs a local machine-learning model on your device.
ml.modelHint: Use the built-in MobileNet-based classifier, or choose a custom local classifier model.
ml.thresholdsHint: Adjust how aggressively AutoSlides removes images it suspects are not slides. Keep: the system is unsure, so the image is kept. Delete: the system is highly confident the image is not a slide, so it is removed. Review: confidence is in-between; the image is kept or removed using the secondary "Is a Slide" probability slider below.
ml.slideCheckSliderLabel: Secondary Filter: "Is a Slide" Probability (Review zone only)

ai.modelChainHint: Models are tried in order. If a model hits its daily quota (HTTP 429), the next enabled model is used automatically. Exhausted state resets when the app restarts.
ai.modelChainAddPlaceholder: Enter model name or pick a preset...
ai.modelChainEmpty: No models in chain. Add one below to enable AI classification.

welcome.title: Welcome to AutoSlides
welcome.subtitle: AutoSlides is a tool designed for BIT students.

courses.signInToLoad: Sign in to load your course list

tasks.noTasks: No Slide Extraction Tasks in Queue
tasks.noTasksDescription: Add recorded sessions to queue to automatically extract slides

extractorInstall.title: Install AutoSlides Extractor
extractorInstall.noPlatformAsset: No installer is available for this platform.
extractorInstall.linuxBuildNotice: There is no official Linux build for AutoSlides Extractor. Please build it from source.
extractorInstall.macInstallNotice: After installing the .dmg, drag the app into /Applications. If macOS quarantines the app, run: sudo xattr -dr com.apple.quarantine "/Applications/AutoSlides Extractor.app"

gallery.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{name}"?
gallery.deleteConfirmDetail: The file will be moved to the in-app trash and can be restored if needed.
gallery.clearAllConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete all {count} slide(s)?
gallery.clearAllConfirmDetail: All slide files will be moved to the in-app trash and can be restored if needed.
gallery.trashFailedSingle: Failed to move slide to trash: {error}
gallery.trashFailedAll: Failed to move slides to trash: {error}

playback.networkProblems: This may be due to video quality issues or network problems. Consider downloading this video for offline viewing to avoid playback interruptions.
playback.browserNotSupported: Your browser does not support the video tag.
playback.taskInProgress: Task in progress. Controls are disabled. If you exit, the task queue will be paused and current task progress will be lost. To adjust settings, please manually pause the task list.
playback.highSpeedWarning: High-speed playback may cause buffering issues. Consider switching to internal network mode for optimal performance at higher speeds.
playback.aiError403: AI filtering failed: Access denied (403). If using the built-in service, please disable VPN or proxy.
playback.aiError413: AI filtering failed: Request too large (413). Please reduce the Batch Size in Advanced Settings > AI tab.
playback.aiError429: AI filtering failed: Rate limit exceeded (429). Please adjust rate limit settings or try again later.
playback.aiErrorHttp: AI filtering failed: HTTP error {code}. Please check your API configuration.
playback.aiErrorUnknown: AI filtering failed: An unexpected error occurred. Please check the console for details.
playback.videoPlayingInPiP: Video playing in Picture in Picture mode
playback.selectOneStreamToCopy: Select one stream to copy its URL

sessions.searchInIndex: Search this course in Cloud Index
sessions.noSessions: No sessions found for this course.
sessions.alreadyInTaskQueue: This session is already in the task queue
sessions.alreadyInDownloadQueue: This camera video is already in the download queue
sessions.alreadyInDownloadQueueScreen: This screen video is already in the download queue
sessions.allInTaskQueue: All sessions are already in the task queue
sessions.addedToDownloadQueue: Added {count} camera videos to download queue
sessions.allInDownloadQueue: All camera videos are already in the download queue
sessions.addedToDownloadQueueScreen: Added {count} screen videos to download queue
sessions.allInDownloadQueueScreen: All screen videos are already in the download queue

updateModal.oldFilesMessage: Found {count} old update file(s) in the downloads folder. Would you like to delete them?

trash.title: Results View
trash.emptyFiltered: No Images Match the Current Filters
trash.confirmClear: Move all trashed items to system trash?
trash.confirmClearFolder: Move all removed images in {folder} to system trash?
trash.watchModeHint: Captured while watching playback — not auto-extracted, so it can't be imported to Notes.
trash.autoCropNoDetectionMessage: No slide area could be detected in this image.
trash.cropHint: Drag the frame or handles to crop
trash.autoCropSelectedHint: Auto crop selected extracted images and AI Filtered – Edit items
trash.autoCropSelectedSummary: Cropped: {cropped} · No Detection: {noDetection} · Duplicates Removed: {deduped} · Failed: {failed}
trash.restoreAndAutoCropHint: Restore and Auto Crop AI Filtered – Edit Items
trash.restoreAutoCropDedupHint: Auto crop extracted and AI Filtered – Edit items, then move pHash duplicates to trash
trash.restoreAutoCropDedupSummary: Cropped: {cropped} · No Detection: {noDetection} · Duplicates Removed: {deduped} · Failed: {failed}
trash.removeDuplicatesHint: Move pHash duplicates in this folder to trash
trash.removeDuplicatesAfterActionsHint: When enabled, crop actions also move pHash duplicates in this folder to trash.
trash.useAsCropBaselineHint: Reuse this image's crop area on other selected images
trash.setBaselineHint: Select exactly one cropped image to use its crop area as the baseline
trash.applyBaselineHint: Apply the baseline crop to selected extracted images and AI Filtered – Edit items
trash.applyBaselineSummary: Cropped: {cropped} · Out of Bounds: {outOfBounds} · Duplicates Removed: {deduped} · Failed: {failed}
trash.restoreAndApplyBaselineHint: Apply baseline to selected extracted images, and restore + crop AI Filtered – Edit items
trash.applyBaselineDedupHint: Apply baseline (incl. restoring AI Filtered – Edit items) then move pHash duplicates to trash
trash.applyBaselineDedupSummary: Cropped: {cropped} · Out of Bounds: {outOfBounds} · Duplicates Removed: {deduped} · Failed: {failed}
trash.restoreAllCroppedHint: Revert every cropped image in this folder to its original uncropped version
trash.confirmRestoreAllCropped: Revert every cropped image in this folder to its original uncropped version?
trash.restoreAutoCroppedHint: Revert only auto-cropped images in this folder (leave manual crops intact)
trash.confirmRestoreAutoCropped: Revert every auto-cropped image in this folder to its original uncropped version? Manual crops are untouched.
trash.keepAiFilteredEdit: Keep Items Marked AI Filtered – Edit
trash.confirmClearFolders: Move {count} folder(s) to system trash? This will also clear all related extracted images and trash entries.

pdfmaker.title: Slides Export
pdfmaker.noImages: No Slide Images in This Folder
pdfmaker.coverCopyright:
This file may contain copyrighted material. The text, images, and video stills within this document are protected by intellectual property law, with all rights reserved by their respective holders. This material was extracted from a recorded lecture solely for personal study, academic reference, and non-commercial educational use. External distribution, commercial exploitation, or unauthorized reproduction is strictly prohibited and may result in legal liability.
AutoSlides operates strictly as an automated processing tool and does not claim ownership, endorse, or assume responsibility for the extracted content. The views and opinions expressed within these materials represent the original authors and not AutoSlides or its affiliates.

offlineProcessing.title: Offline Post-Processing
offlineProcessing.exclusionListNote: Uses the exclusion list and AI configuration from Advanced Settings
offlineProcessing.noImagesFound: No Image Files Found in Selected Folder

compressLecture.commandPreviewPlaceholder: Click "Preview Command" to generate the ffmpeg command

cloudNotes.bannerNotice: Note: Yanhekt stores note images in public storage and anyone can access them. Do not include private or sensitive images.
cloudNotes.notSignedIn: Sign in from the main window to use Drive.
cloudNotes.storageNotInitialized: Cloud storage isn't initialized. Initialize it in Settings → Cloud or on the Drive page first.
cloudNotes.storageCheckFailed: Couldn't verify cloud storage. Check your connection and try again.
cloudNotes.initStorageTip: Create the AutoSlides-managed group and add a README note
cloudNotes.readmeBody1: This note explains the "ASnote" group in your Yanhekt notes. AutoSlides created and manages that group — it is where AutoSlides syncs your extracted slides.
cloudNotes.readmeBody4: AutoSlides also manages an "ASuser" group for your personal watch-mode notes: when you take notes while watching a live stream or a recorded session, captured slides are appended there. These notes are yours to edit freely and can be exported (PDF, Markdown, or DOCX); they are never published to the shared Index.
cloudNotes.readmeBody2: Please don't manually rename, move, or edit notes inside the ASnote group: AutoSlides may overwrite them when it re-syncs.
cloudNotes.readmeBody3: Note: slide images are uploaded to Yanhekt's public storage, so anyone with the link can view them. Don't include private or sensitive images.
cloudNotes.newGroupHelp: Group name is limited to {max} characters.
cloudNotes.selectNote: Select a note to view or edit

watchNotes.error: Couldn't create the note. Check your connection and try again.
watchNotes.hint: Start slide extraction while watching to create a note here. Captured slides are appended automatically.

cloudNotes.confirmDeleteNote: Delete this note? This cannot be undone.
cloudNotes.confirmDeleteGroup: Delete group "{name}"? Notes inside move to Ungrouped.
cloudNotes.importTip: Import extracted slide folders into your AutoSlides-managed group
cloudNotes.importWatchHint: These folders were captured while you watched a live or recorded session, not extracted automatically, so AutoSlides can't confirm they contain every slide. They're kept out of import so shared slide sets stay complete.
cloudNotes.importConflictHint: A note already exists for these folders. Replace deletes the old notes; Create adds a new one alongside.
cloudNotes.exportTip: Export managed notes back to local slide folders
cloudNotes.exportConflictHint: A folder already exists for these notes. Replace deletes the old folder (and its trash/crop); Create adds a new one alongside.
cloudNotes.exportTip: Export this note to a file
cloudNotes.exportHint: Choose a format. Text and captured slides are included.
cloudNotes.exportMarkdownDesc: A .zip with note.md and an images folder.
cloudNotes.shareTip: Share this note's slides as a link
cloudNotes.shareNoImages: This note has no images to share.
cloudNotes.shareIndexUnavailable: Only notes from a recorded session can be indexed.
cloudNotes.shareIndexReviewWarn: These slides haven't been reviewed yet. Publish to Cloud Index anyway, or review them first?

webCapture.name: Name
webCapture.regionHint: Drag over the page to choose a capture region
webCapture.captureModeSwitched: Inject capture blocked by cross-origin media; switching to capturePage

yuketang.defaultStatus: Open Yuketang and navigate to a lesson report or class fullscreen page.
yuketang.lessonReady: Lesson report detected, you can export slides.
yuketang.classReady: Class fullscreen detected, you can export slides.
yuketang.classWaiting: Class fullscreen detected, waiting for presentation capture...
yuketang.noLessonId: No lesson ID detected. Open a lesson report page or class fullscreen.

closeGuard.title: Work still in progress
closeGuard.message: Tasks or downloads are still running.
closeGuard.detail: If you quit now, in-progress tasks and downloads will be stopped and any unfinished work will be lost. Are you sure you want to quit?

onboarding.welcomeSubtitle: Before you get started, we recommend adjusting a few basic settings to suit your needs. You can change any of these later in Settings.
onboarding.outputTitle: Where would you like slides to be saved?
onboarding.outputDescription: Choose a working directory for AutoSlides — it's used to store slides, downloads, and exported files. A dedicated folder is recommended.
onboarding.connectionTitle: Where do you usually use AutoSlides?
onboarding.connectionDescription: When connected to the campus network, switch to Internal Network for faster connection speeds. To use it off campus, switch to External Network.
onboarding.audioTitle: Would you like videos muted during playback?
onboarding.audioDescription: You can choose separately whether live and recorded playback stay muted.
onboarding.taskSpeedTitle: How fast would you like tasks to run?
onboarding.taskSpeedDescription: Slide extraction tasks play videos at this speed. A higher speed — up to 16× — is recommended on Internal Network.
onboarding.parallelTasksTitle: How many tasks should run at once?
onboarding.parallelTasksDescription: Run several task videos and slide extractions in parallel. Post-processing still runs one task at a time.
onboarding.aiTitle: Use GitHub Copilot for AI filtering?
onboarding.aiDescription: AutoSlides uses AI to filter out non-slide frames. We recommend Copilot's free gpt-4.1 model — just sign in with a GitHub account.
onboarding.signInDescription: Sign in to Yanhekt with your BIT SSO account or sign in with browser if you encounter two-factor verification.
onboarding.allSetDescription: You're already signed in and ready to go.

home.signInHint: Sign in to see your live streams and recordings

campusWarning.message: Internal network mode is on, but the campus network can't be reached. You may want to

tabs.closeDisabledTask: Can't close while the task is running
tabs.limitMessage: You have reached the maximum number of open playback tabs. Close a tab or raise the limit in Settings > General.
